description: Fitz confesses to the team that The Doctor is behind the attacks and deduces Daisy is his next target. The group scrambles to figure out The Doctor's plan, and Fitz sets off to find Daisy before it's too late. Urgency turns to dread as they realize Daisy is already isolated.

transcript.line: I'm sorry. This is my fault. This is my fault. If I'd just... If I could have just worked out how to s-shut the rift sooner, then... then my greatest fear wouldn't be...
Who says it's your greatest fear?
Who cares whose fear it is? What matters is stopping him.
What does he want?
I don't... I don't know.
But you do, Fitz. He is you, so just think.
No, I... No. I-I don't know.
You have to try. This is our only lead to gain some insight into... into what he might be after.
He said that he wanted to do what I was unable to do. To finish what was started.
What does that mean? Was he trying to bring back AIDA? Make her another body?
After Ghost Rider? I don't think there's any coming back from that.
That wasn't his only operation in the Framework. He was also in charge of Inhuman experimentation.
That's why he sent that Terminator after Yo-Yo.
And that means he's also after...
Daisy.
Where is she?
There was a surveillance shortage on one of the other levels. She went to check it out.
Okay, we have to... we have to lock down the base, close the Doctor in.
I'll find her.
What the hell? There's nothing wrong with you. Okay, wild goose, one. Daisy Johnson, zero.
